summary: Completed iteration 14 testing: Dropdown navigation menu, Language switcher (8 languages), and AI Chatbot. All features work correctly. Backend 11/11 tests passed, Frontend UI fully functional.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: /api/ root endpoint working
✅ Backend: /api/categories returns 15 categories
✅ Backend: /api/stats returns project and company counts
✅ Backend: /api/chatbot/message responds to valid messages
✅ Backend: /api/chatbot/message returns 400 for empty message
✅ Backend: /api/chatbot/message returns 400 for missing message field
✅ Backend: /api/chatbot/message handles language hints (German test)
✅ Backend: /api/chatbot/message handles Bulgarian messages
✅ Backend: /api/projects listing works
✅ Backend: /api/projects filter by category works
✅ Backend: /api/companies listing works
✅ Frontend: Desktop nav shows 4 main items (Проекти, Майстори, Фирми, Калкулатор)
✅ Frontend: 'Още' dropdown button visible with ChevronDown icon
✅ Frontend: 'Още' dropdown contains 5 items (Услуги, Професии, Блог, Цени по области, За нас)
✅ Frontend: Language switcher button shows globe icon + current language code (BG)
✅ Frontend: Language dropdown shows 8 languages with flags (BG, EN, DE, FR, ES, IT, RU, TR)
✅ Frontend: Switching to English changes nav text (Projects, Masters, Companies, Calculator, More)
✅ Frontend: Switching to German changes nav text (Projekte, Meister, Firmen, Rechner, Mehr)
✅ Frontend: Language choice persists in localStorage under 'temadom_lang' key
✅ Frontend: Chatbot floating button visible at bottom-right (position x=1840, y=944 on desktop)
✅ Frontend: Clicking chatbot button opens chat window with welcome message
✅ Frontend: Chatbot window has title 'TemaDom Асистент', subtitle, close button, message area, input field, send button
✅ Frontend: Chatbot close button works (closes window, floating button reappears)
✅ Frontend: Mobile hamburger menu shows all navigation items
✅ Frontend: Mobile language switcher (globe icon) available next to hamburger menu
✅ Frontend: Mobile chatbot button visible at bottom-right
critical_code_review_comments: Language context implementation is clean with localStorage persistence
Chatbot uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations - may encounter budget errors in production
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Separate refs for desktop (langRef) and mobile (mobileLangRef) language dropdowns correctly handle outside click detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 fully tested. Dropdown navigation working - 4 main items visible (Проекти, Майстори, Фирми, Калкулатор), 5 items in 'Още' dropdown (Услуги, Професии, Блог, Цени по области, За нас). Language switcher has 8 languages with flags, persists to localStorage('temadom_lang'). Chatbot uses GPT-4o and works correctly. Mobile responsive navigation tested.

dropdown_navigation.details: Desktop shows 4 main nav items + 'Още' dropdown with 5 more items. Mobile hamburger menu shows all items.

language_switcher.details: Globe icon + language code in navbar, 8 languages with flags (BG, EN, DE, FR, ES, IT, RU, TR), persists to localStorage

language_switching.details: Nav text changes correctly when switching languages (tested BG->EN->DE). Login/Register buttons also translate.

chatbot_button.details: Orange floating button at bottom-right with z-index 100, opens chat window on click

chatbot_window.details: Window has title, subtitle, messages area with welcome message, input field, send button, close button. Close works correctly.

chatbot_endpoint.details: /api/chatbot/message endpoint works, returns 400 for empty/missing message, uses GPT-4o for responses

mobile_responsive.details: Hamburger menu shows all nav items, globe icon for language switcher next to hamburger, chatbot button visible
